hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built by Owners Who
Never Leave the Job
hero.subheadline: For 27 years, Tom Gilbert and his in-house crew have designed and built award-winning pools across East Central Florida. No subcontractors, no runaround -- just a family-owned team that treats your backyard like their own.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: From Custom Builds to<br class="hidden md:block"> Ongoing Pool Care
services.subtitle: Whether you are dreaming of a brand-new pool or need expert service on the one you have, our in-house team handles it all with award-winning craftsmanship.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Award-winning gunite and fiberglass pool designs built by our in-house crews. Every pool is tailored to your vision, your yard, and your budget.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into an aging pool with modern finishes, updated equipment, and design upgrades that transform your entire backyard.

cards.title: Monthly Pool Service
cards.description: Recurring maintenance to keep your water crystal clear and chemically balanced year-round. We handle everything so you just enjoy the swim.

cards.title: Service Calls & Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems -- our technicians diagnose and repair fast. Most issues resolved in a single visit.

cards.title: Water & Fire Features
cards.description: Stunning water features, fire bowls, and fire-and-water combinations that turn your pool area into a true outdoor resort.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Enclosures
cards.description: Custom summer kitchens and screen enclosures designed alongside your pool for a complete outdoor living experience.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your vision. Tom or a senior designer will visit your home, discuss your ideas, and provide an honest quote with no pressure and no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build In-House
steps.description: Our award-winning design team creates your custom plan. Then our 25+ in-house professionals build it from the ground up -- the owner is on every job site.

steps.title: Dive Into Your Dream Pool
steps.description: Your pool is completed on schedule and built to last. We walk you through everything and offer ongoing maintenance so it stays perfect for years to come.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Award-Winning, and On Every Job Site
about.description: Founded by Tom Gilbert in 1999, East Coast Pools & Spas has grown from a one-man operation into Volusia County's premier pool builder with 25+ in-house professionals. Tom started in the pool industry at 18 and built a company rooted in one principle: the owner and in-house crews are on every single job. No subcontractors, no communication gaps. Just a team that has earned the Daytona Beach Reader's Choice Best Pool Builder award every year since 2014.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Tom Gilbert personally oversees each project. You deal directly with the owner, not a middleman or subcontractor.

features.title: 100% In-House Crews
features.description: Every member of our 25+ person team works for us directly. That means consistent quality, clear communication, and true accountability.

features.title: Award-Winning Year After Year
features.description: Consecutive Reader's Choice Best Pool Builder since 2014, plus multiple FSPA Design Awards including Best in Show 2022.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written quote upfront. We build pools for every budget and never hit you with hidden costs.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We stand behind every pool we build and every service call we make. If something is not right, we come back and fix it at no charge. With 27 years in business and awards to prove it, our reputation is built on doing things right the first time -- and making it right if we ever fall short.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom pool?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool builds take 8-12 weeks depending on design complexity, permitting, and weather. Tom will walk you through a realistic timeline during your free consultation so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you use subcontractors on pool builds?
faqs.answer: Never. Every aspect of your pool build is handled by our in-house team of 25+ professionals. That is one of the biggest reasons homeowners choose us -- you get consistent quality and direct communication from start to finish.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Ormond Beach, Daytona Beach, Palm Coast, Port Orange, New Smyrna Beach, St. Augustine, and all of Volusia and Flagler counties. With locations in Ormond Beach and St. Augustine, we cover East Central Florida.

faqs.question: Can you build a pool on any budget?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We design pools for every budget, from streamlined builds to full custom resort-style projects. During your free consultation, we will find the best approach to match your vision and your investment.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing pool maintenance after the build?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance contracts to keep your pool clean, chemically balanced, and running at peak performance year-round. We also handle one-time service calls and equipment repairs.

testimonials.name: Verified Houzz Reviewer
testimonials.text: East Coast Pools & Spas delivered exactly what we envisioned. Tom and his crew were professional from start to finish, and the quality of the build is outstanding. We could not be happier with our new pool.

testimonials.name: Reader's Choice Voter
testimonials.text: There is a reason they win Best Pool Builder every single year. The attention to detail and craftsmanship is unmatched in the area. Tom treats every project like it is his own backyard.

testimonials.name: Ormond Beach Homeowner
testimonials.text: From the initial design consultation to the final startup, everything was handled in-house by their team. No subcontractors, no communication gaps. The pool, outdoor kitchen, and screen enclosure turned out perfect.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure design consultation. Tom and his team will visit your home, discuss your vision, and provide an honest quote -- no obligation.

footer.description: Family-owned pool builder serving East Central Florida since 1999. Award-winning designs built by in-house crews.
